security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://pets.thenightwatcher.online data: ; connect-src 'self' https://pets.thenightwatcher.online ipc: http://ipc.localhost ; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: A desktop pet that watches your AI coding agents.
bundle.longDescription: AgentPet floats a pixel companion on your desktop that reacts in real time to your AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, ...).
